lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਦੁਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 ghar 2 dupade |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl, Second House, Dho-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਨੀਚ ਮਹਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਮਾਧਉ ਜੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aooch neech meh jot samaanee ghatt ghatt maadhau jeea |1|
lines.english: God's Light is contained in the high and the low; the Lord is in the hearts of all beings. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਬਨਸਪਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਬੈਸੰਤਰੁ ਸਗਲ ਦੂਧ ਮਹਿ ਘੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sagal banasapat meh baisantar sagal doodh meh gheea |
lines.english: Fire is contained in all firewood, and butter is contained in all milk.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਹੁ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਹਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: santahu ghatt ghatt rahiaa samaahio |
lines.english: O Saints, He is pervading and permeating each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਰਬ ਮਹਿ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਰਮਈਆ ਆਹਿਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: pooran poor rahio sarab meh jal thal rameea aahio |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Lord is completely permeating everyone, everywhere; He is diffused in the water and the land. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਸਦਾ ਅਲੇਪਾ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇਓ ॥੨॥੧॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: sarab nivaasee sadaa alepaa sabh meh rahiaa samaaeo |2|1|29|
lines.english: The Lord is pervading everywhere, permeating all, and yet, He is unattached from all. ||2||1||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵੈ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan naanak jas gaavai satigur bharam chukaaeo |
lines.english: Nanak sings the Praises of the Lord, the treasure of excellence; the True Guru has dispelled his doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਨੰਦਾ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਭੈ ਦੁਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran hoe anandaa binasai janam maran bhai dukhee |
lines.english: Meditating on Him, one is in ecstasy; the pains of birth and death and fear are removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਲੈਤ ਤੂ ਸੁਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa ko naam lait too sukhee |
lines.english: Chanting His Name, you shall be at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਪਦਾਰਥ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੁਖੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chaar padaarath nav nidh paaveh bahur na trisanaa bhukhee |1|
lines.english: The four cardinal blessings, and the nine treasures are received; you shall never feel hunger or thirst again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕਉ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਜੀਅਰੇ ਮੁਖੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas dhiaavahu tthaakur kau man tan jeeare mukhee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With each and every breath, meditate on the Lord and Master, O my soul, with mind, body and mouth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਮਨ ਸੀਤਲ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਧੁਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: saant paaveh hoveh man seetal agan na antar dhukhee |
lines.english: You shall find peace, and your mind shall be soothed and cooled; the fire of desire shall not burn within you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣਿ ਰੁਖੀ ॥੨॥੨॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: gur naanak kau prabhoo dikhaaeaa jal thal tribhavan rukhee |2|2|30|
lines.english: The Guru has revealed God to Nanak, in the three worlds, in the water, the earth and the woods. ||2||2||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਭੀਤਰ ਤੇ ਇਨ ਕਉ ਡਾਰਹੁ ਆਪਨ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਬੁਲਾਵਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eih bheetar te in kau ddaarahu aapan nikatt bulaavahu |1|
lines.english: Please eradicate these from within me, and call me to come close to You. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧ ਲੋਭ ਝੂਠ ਨਿੰਦਾ ਇਨ ਤੇ ਆਪਿ ਛਡਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh jhootth nindaa in te aap chhaddaavahu |
lines.english: Sexual desire, anger, greed, falsehood and slander - please, save me from these, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਮੰਗਲ ਗਾਵਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jan mangal gaavahu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: With the Lord's humble servants, I sing His Praises. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪੁਨੀ ਬਿਧਿ ਆਪਿ ਜਨਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: apunee bidh aap janaavahu |
lines.english: You alone teach me Your Ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਬਹੂ ਹੀਏ ਤੇ ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: bisar naahee kabahoo hee te ih bidh man meh paavahu |
lines.english: May I never forget the Lord within my heart; please, instill such understanding within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਓ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਧਾਵਹੁ ॥੨॥੩॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa bhettio vaddabhaagee jan naanak kateh na dhaavahu |2|3|31|
lines.english: By great good fortune, servant Nanak has met with the Perfect Guru, and now, he will not go anywhere else. ||2||3||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸਿਮਰਣਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਛੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਰਥੀ ਘਾਲ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai simaran sabh kachh paaeeai birathee ghaal na jaaee |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on Him, all things are obtained, and one's efforts shall not be in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਗੋਪਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har simarahu sant gopaalaa |
lines.english: O Saints, meditate in remembrance on the World-Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਅਵਰ ਕਤ ਰਾਚਹੁ ਜੋ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tis prabh tiaag avar kat raachahu jo sabh meh rahiaa samaaee |1|
lines.english: Forsaking God, why do you attach yourself to another? He is contained in everything. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਲੈ ਨਿਤਿ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਸਹਿਤ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: saar samaalai nit pratipaalai prem sahit gal laavai |
lines.english: He ever preserves and cherishes His servant; with Love, He hugs him close.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਵੈ ਘਾਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang mil naam dhiaavahu pooran hovai ghaalaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; your efforts shall be rewarded. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮਰੇ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਜਗਤ ਜੀਵਨੁ ਕੈਸੇ ਪਾਵੈ ॥੨॥੪॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak prabh tumare bisarat jagat jeevan kaise paavai |2|4|32|
lines.english: Says Nanak, forgetting You, O God, how can the world find life? ||2||4||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਜੀਅਨ ਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਸਭ ਮਲੁ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: abinaasee jeean ko daataa simarat sabh mal khoee |
lines.english: He is imperishable, the Giver of all beings; meditating on Him, all filth is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਰਠਿ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soratth mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਭਗਤਨ ਕਉ ਬਰਤਨਿ ਬਿਰਲਾ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gun nidhaan bhagatan kau baratan biralaa paavai koee |1|
lines.english: He is the treasure of excellence, the object of His devotees, but rare are those who find Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਜਪਿ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਪਾਲ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: mere man jap gur gopaal prabh soee |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Guru, and God, the Cherisher of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਇਆਂ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee saran peaan sukh paaeeai baahurr dookh na hoee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Seeking His Sanctuary, one finds peace, and he shall not suffer in pain again. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਤਿਨ ਭੇਟਤ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee saadhasang paraapat tin bhettat duramat khoee |
lines.english: By great good fortune, one obtains the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. Meeting them, evil-mindedness is eliminated.
